languages.text: "Погибнуть сейчас или сгинуть в ледяной стуже, но позже? Выбор под стать нашим грехам, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы еще послужим Императору и отработаем грехи этого мира. Мы родились здесь, и умрем вместе с ним".

traits.locale_text: "Погибнуть сейчас или сгинуть в ледяной стуже, но позже? Выбор под стать нашим грехам, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы еще послужим Императору и отработаем грехи этого мира. Мы родились здесь, и умрем вместе с ним".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Погибнуть сейчас или сгинуть в ледяной стуже, но позже? Выбор под стать нашим грехам, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы еще послужим Императору и отработаем грехи этого мира. Мы родились здесь, и умрем вместе с ним".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "To die now or to perish in an icy blizzard some time later? You present us with a choice that matches our faults, o Heavenly Envoy. We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labour. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."
languages.original_text: "Погибнуть сейчас или сгинуть в ледяной стуже, но позже? Выбор под стать нашим грехам, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы еще послужим Императору и отработаем грехи этого мира. Мы родились здесь, и умрем вместе с ним".

We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labor. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."

We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labor. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."

traits.locale_text: "To die now or to perish in an icy blizzard some time later? You present us with a choice that matches our faults, o Heavenly Envoy. We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labour. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Jetzt zu sterben oder später in einem eisigen Schneesturm umzukommen? Du stellst uns vor eine Wahl, die unseren Fehlern entspricht, o himmlischer Gesandter. Wir werden dem Kaiser ein letztes Mal dienen und die Sünden dieser Welt mit unserer harten Arbeit wiedergutmachen. Wir wurden auf dieser Welt geboren und wir werden hier mit ihr sterben."
languages.original_text: "To die now or to perish in an icy blizzard some time later? You present us with a choice that matches our faults, o Heavenly Envoy. We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labour. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."

languages.text: "Mourir maintenant ou périr dans un blizzard glacial un peu plus tard ? Tu nous proposes un choix à la hauteur de nos fautes, ô Envoyé céleste. Nous servirons l'empereur une dernière fois et nous rachèterons les transgressions de ce monde par notre dur labeur. Nous sommes nés sur ce monde et nous y mourrons avec lui."
languages.original_text: "To die now or to perish in an icy blizzard some time later? You present us with a choice that matches our faults, o Heavenly Envoy. We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labour. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."

languages.text: "是现在就死，还是过段时间在冰天雪地里灭亡？你给了我们一个与我们的过错相匹配的选择，天国的使者啊。我们将最后一次侍奉皇帝，用我们的辛勤劳动来赎回这个世界的过错。我们生于此世，也将与此世同归于尽。"
languages.original_text: "To die now or to perish in an icy blizzard some time later? You present us with a choice that matches our faults, o Heavenly Envoy. We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labour. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."

languages.text: "¿Morir ahora o perecer en una ventisca helada tiempo después? Nos presentas una elección que se ajusta a nuestras faltas, oh Enviado Celestial. Serviremos al Emperador por última vez y redimiremos las transgresiones de este mundo con nuestro duro trabajo. Nacimos en este mundo y moriremos aquí junto con él".
languages.original_text: "To die now or to perish in an icy blizzard some time later? You present us with a choice that matches our faults, o Heavenly Envoy. We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labour. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."

languages.text: 「今すぐ死ぬか、しばらくして凍てつく吹雪の中で死ぬか。天の使者よ、あなたは私たちに、私たちの欠点に見合った選択肢を提示してくださいました。私たちは最後に皇帝に仕え、この世の罪を償うのです。我々はこの世界で生まれ、この世界と共にここで死ぬのだ」。
languages.original_text: "To die now or to perish in an icy blizzard some time later? You present us with a choice that matches our faults, o Heavenly Envoy. We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labour. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."

languages.text: "Şimdi ölmek mi yoksa bir süre sonra buz gibi bir kar fırtınasında yok olmak mı? Bize hatalarımızla örtüşen bir seçenek sunuyorsunuz, ey Cennet Elçisi. İmparatora son bir kez daha hizmet edeceğiz ve bu dünyanın günahlarını ağır emeğimizle telafi edeceğiz. Biz bu dünyada doğduk ve onunla birlikte burada öleceğiz."
languages.original_text: "To die now or to perish in an icy blizzard some time later? You present us with a choice that matches our faults, o Heavenly Envoy. We will serve the Emperor one last time and redeem the transgressions of this world with our hard labour. We were born on this world and we will die here along with it."
